empleos.descripcion: Job Title: Junior Software Engineer – Remote Work Mode: Fully Remote Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability) Role Overview: We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required. Key Responsibilities Review and evaluate code written by AI models for accuracy, efficiency, and best practices Rate AI responses across key dimensions including correctness, instruction-following, and quality Write original computer science questions and coding challenges to test AI capabilities Identify bugs, errors, and inconsistencies in AI-generated code using structured guidelines Provide clear, constructive, and structured written feedback to improve AI responses Follow project guidelines, quality standards, and confidentiality requirements Qualifications Software engineering experience — junior, mid-level, or senior welcome Proficiency in one or more of the following: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Swift, or Rust Strong attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills Background in full stack, backend, frontend, mobile, or any engineering discipline Eligibility Requirements Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations: Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Belize, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Dominica, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, Trinidad and To

empleos.descripcion: About Flatiron is a global remote software development company with engineers located around the world. We unite experts from diverse backgrounds and experiences in a collaborative culture to deliver exceptional products and services for our clients. As a forward-thinking software engineering company, we provide industry-leading solutions to complex problems in both the US and the UK. Operating in a fast-paced, agile environment, we specialize in software consulting for our clients. We offer a stimulating and rewarding environment for our team members. We value innovation, continuous learning, and professional growth, and we strive to create a workplace where everyone can thrive. Join us at Flatiron and be a part of a team that is shaping the future of software development. Job Summary This is a full-time fully remote working opportunity where you will be working as part of a Scrum team which requires working closely with other software engineers, stakeholders and contributors on the project. Working with respect to the US timezone is a requirement for the position. Attending meetings, being actively involved in the decision making process and collaborating with all of these stakeholders are essential parts of this position. Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, high-performance full stack applications with a strong emphasis on backend architecture. Lead and contribute to the integration of AI/ML features into products, collaborating closely with data scientists and engineers. Develop robust backend services and APIs using Python or Node.js (Express, NestJS). Contribute to frontend development using React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript practices. Identify, prioritize, and execute tasks throughout the software development lifecycle. Debug, optimize, and maint

empleos.descripcion: We are seeking a Full Stack .NET Application Developer to design, build, and maintain scalable web applications. You will work across both front-end and back-end layers, using the Microsoft .NET ecosystem and modern web technologies. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys collaborating with product managers, designers, and engineering peers in a fast-paced environment. You’ll contribute to delivering reliable, maintainable, and secure software from concept to deployment. What You’ll Do Design, develop, test, and deploy high-performance web applications using C# and ASP.NET Core Build front-end features with modern JavaScript frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js Implement and consume RESTful APIs to support web and mobile applications Develop and maintain SQL Server database models, queries, and stored procedures Ensure code quality, maintainability, and application security by following best practices Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and knowledge sharing Troubleshoot and resolve issues across front-end and back-end layers Write clear documentation and contribute to internal knowledge bases Stay up to date on new technologies and trends in .NET and web development How You’ll Succeed Deliver high-quality, maintainable, and secure applications Communicate technical concepts clearly to peers and stakeholders Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams to meet business goals Proactively identify and solve technical challenges Apply best practices in testing, deployment, and security Who You Are 3+ years of hands-on experience building full stack applications with C# and ASP.NET Core Proficient in front-end technologies (JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3) and modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue.js) Strong experience with SQL Server, incl

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Node.js, Full Stack, TypeScript, Front End, Back End
empleos.descripcion: Buscamos un desarrollador Fullstack Senior (Node.js + Angular) para empresa líder en fintech. Importante: Posición remota pero deben residir en Córdoba o Buenos Aires (con facilidad para ir a las oficinas y tener encuentros presenciales por cuatrimestre) Tecnologías clave: Node.js, Angular, AWS (EKS/Lambda) ¿Qué desafío te espera? Buscamos a una persona apasionada por la arquitectura y el desarrollo de software, con un enfoque fullstack senior, para sumarse a un equipo que construye soluciones escalables de alto impacto. Más allá de tirar código, buscamos a un referente técnico hands-on: alguien con la autonomía necesaria para tomar decisiones de arquitectura, proponer mejoras y garantizar la robustez del producto. Vas a trabajar en una infraestructura moderna basada en AWS, colaborando directamente con producto, UX, proveedores y negocio, siendo el dueño técnico de tus desarrollos. Stack tecnológico Backend: Node.js (Fastify), API REST, arquitecturas orientadas a eventos y seguridad avanzada. Frontend: Angular (últimas versiones), TypeScript, RxJS, SCSS. Cloud: AWS (Expertise en EKS, Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, Cloudfront, CloudWatch). Testing: Foco en calidad con Jest y Cypress. Requisitos +6 años de experiencia real como desarrollador/a fullstack en entornos complejos. Sólidos conocimientos y autonomía en Node.js y Angular de forma principal. Experiencia avanzada diseñando e integrando APIs REST y servicios en la nube (AWS es excluyente para este seniority). Criterio técnico: maestría en buenas prácticas, clean code y patrones de diseño. Capacidad de análisis: entendimiento funcional para traducir necesidades de negocio en soluciones técnicas eficientes. Excelente comunicación y capacidad para canalizar soluciones dentro del equipo.

About you You are someone who wants to influence your own development. You’re looking for a company where you have the opportunity to pursue your interests and be able to grow professionally. You bring to Applaudo the following competencies: Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Computer Science or Computer Engineering or related field or equivalent experience. 2+ years of experience working with React Native (workflows such as Flux or Redux). Experience using flutter (desirable). Familiarity with native build tools, like XCode, Gradle (Android Studio, IntelliJ). Desirable (not a must) basic knowledge in languages related to native mobile development such as Objective C, Swift, Kotlin or Java. Expertise working with hybrid apps for iOS and Android like WebView Knowledge of Scrum. You will be accountable for the following responsibilities: Developing new user-facing features using React Native. Optimizing components for maximum performance across a vast array of mobile devices Outstanding skills at interacting with people, both within the organization (from developers to senior management) and with customers/partners. Responsible, organized and goal oriented with excellent communication skills Qualifications Technical Skills Frameworks: React Native (Flux or Redux) Additional Information Here at Applaudo Studios values as trust, communication, respect, excellence and team work are our keys to success. We know we are working with the best and thus treat each other with respect and admiration without asking. Submit your application today, and don't miss this opportunity to join the Best Digital team in the Region!
